note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left lower leg wound site, rates 6/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Venous venous Left lower leg measures 2.2 cm x 5.4 cm x 0.6 cm.
  Wound bed: 32% slough, 68% granulation tissue. Periwound: indurated.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Venous venous Left lower leg — improving.
Plan: Offloading boot applied. Negative pressure wound therapy initiated.

Wound note - Leftlowerleg. Meas 2.2x5.4x0.6cm. Mod serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 51% gran, 49% slough. Periwound macerated. Collagen dsg changed. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Johansson notified.
